topic: The government filing that used to take a full day — now submitted in 20 minutes from one screen
format: Walk through the before and after in precise detail — same task, completely different experience from start to finish
post:
A Ministry of Labour filing dropped from 7–8 hours to 20 minutes. Same filing. Same ministry. One system change.

Pull the employee file. Cross-check the permit number. Fill the form manually. Print, sign, scan. Email it in. Wait for confirmation. Chase if nothing came back.

7–8 hours. Every time.

Now it's 20 minutes.

The employee data is already in SmartPRO Hub — work permit details, contract status, visa expiry, all of it. Ahmed picks the submission type, checks the pre-filled fields, sends. One screen. No printer. No follow-up emails.

The hours he used to lose every week are now spent on actual work.

This isn't a workaround or a Western HR tool bolted onto Omani compliance as an afterthought. It was built around how Omani compliance actually works — Ministry of Labour requirements included from the start, not patched in later.

If your team is still blocking out half a day for a government filing that should take 20 minutes, that gap has a number on it. Probably adds up faster than you'd like.

Book a free 30-minute demo: https://thesmartpro.io/book?type=demo&utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=proof
